title: William's Console Resources
description: Resources used in the William's Console modpack
body: # William's Console Resources [](https://modrinth.com/modpack/williams-console-revisited) [](https://ko-fi.com/omoso) **This requires the Legacy4J mod.** William's Console Resources is a resource pack that adds on optional content for William's Console: Revisited, a modpack that adds modded content in a console edition style ![Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cff8bdab95d82b27c303622c1ac1cbe85db7bfd1.png) # Features - A new panorama # Need a server? [![BisectHosting Partnership](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d811a958c28645cf1007ccc3d90cb282921bf7f.webp)](https://bh.naomieow.xyz/raamviot50)
